title: LinkedIn authentication failure
symptom: Users are unable to authenticate with LinkedIn, resulting in failed connections. Attempts to resolve the issue using community solutions have not been successful.
not_this_if: Authentication works when organization support is disabled
root_cause: The LinkedIn API may have issues with organization support enabled, causing authentication failures. Disabling this feature can resolve conflicts that prevent successful authentication.
fix_steps: Turn off the organization support option
agent_instruction: Disable organization support in the LinkedIn node settings and save the changes.
